personal.name: Ishan Paharia
personal.headline: I build systems that make products feel clear, fast, and finished.

about: I'm a front-end developer with 5 years of experience building production-grade digital products with React, Next.js, and JavaScript. My first name is Salah Eddine. If it's easier, you can call me Eddy.
I care about interfaces that feel polished on the surface and stay reliable underneath, with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and consistency as products grow.

My work spans product UI, reusable component systems, and frontend architecture, with close attention to accessibility and detail. I enjoy turning complex ideas into experiences that feel clear, fast, and natural for users.
I'm currently working at Eye4Media, and previously contributed to digital products through Eddy Tech and Engagia.

projects.title: Asklo
projects.description: Collaborative QA platform for modern software development teams.
details: Architected real-time message syncing reducing network payload overhead by 40%.
Designed and implemented custom rich-text code editor with syntax highlighting.
Built responsive UI supporting both nested threading and horizontal workspace layouts.

projects.title: Mono UI
projects.description: Minimalist, accessible component library optimized for rapid prototyping.
details: Compiled 40+ lightweight React components compliant with WAI-ARIA guidelines.
Reduced bundle size by 35% using tree-shaking and ES modules distribution.
Integrated CSS-in-JS design tokens supporting fluid scale-based system.

projects.title: Noteed
projects.description: Markdown note-taking application with offline-first synchronization.
details: Integrated IndexedDB (via Dexie.js) for robust client-side storage.
Programmed service workers enabling offline editing and conflict resolution.
Implemented markdown parser with customizable keybind presets.

projects.title: Home Finder
projects.description: Real estate listing matching engine with spatial map queries.
details: Mapped geocoding queries with Mapbox GL to show neighborhood boundaries.
Created custom filter hook returning search matches within 5ms on 10k items.
Constructed fluid search layouts with collapsible criteria options.

bullets: Built and maintained production web platforms with React and Next.js, improving performance and reducing load times by 40-50%.
Translated product requirements into responsive, accessible interfaces with stronger mobile usability and retention.
Integrated backend services, third-party APIs, and internal workflows to reduce manual operations and speed up feature delivery.
Worked closely with design, product, and stakeholders to ship reliable releases with a strong focus on quality and user experience.
Consulted with startup clients to build greenfield web products and MVPs.
Optimized SEO performance and core web vitals, raising Lighthouse scores to 95+.
Engineered scalable Node.js REST APIs and integrated them into frontend panels.
Maintained client-facing dashboards, resolving interface bugs and layout issues.
Refactored legacy vanilla CSS stylesheets to reusable utility structures.
Participated in agile sprints, daily standups, and peer code reviews.

interests.title: Usability & Product Design
interests.description: Revisiting classic user experience patterns to design software that feels invisible and natural to use.
interests.metric: Reading: The Design of Everyday Things

interests.title: Creative Coding & Micro-interactions
interests.description: Exploring canvas rendering, hardware-accelerated animations, and physical UI states.

interests.title: Open Source Contributions
interests.description: Publishing accessible headless React hooks and utility functions for developer tools.

chatDatabase.question: What is your name?
chatDatabase.answer: My name is Salah Eddine A. (though you can call me Eddy). I am a Front-End Developer who builds clean, fast, and polished web systems.

chatDatabase.question: Show me your projects
chatDatabase.answer: Here are some of the main products I have designed and built. I specialize in high-performance React and Next.js applications.

chatDatabase.answer: I work with a variety of frontend and backend technologies, centering around React, Next.js, and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS.
